response.justification: Bogdan has strong software development experience and proficiency in C, Linux, and embedded-related work (e.g., National Instruments, GISCollective), but lacks direct experience with security features for embedded networking (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X, tamper detection) and networking-specific technologies (e.g., NETCONF, SNMP, switch chip knowledge). His expertise leans toward web/mobile development and general systems programming, with limited exposure to security-focused embedded firmware. His multilingual skills (fluent English, German basics) partially meet the Japanese requirement but are not native-level.
strengths: Proficient in C and Linux, with experience in embedded systems (National Instruments)
Strong software development background with expertise in multiple languages (TypeScript, D, Java, etc.)
Demonstrated ability to work in diverse technical domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI infrastructure)
concerns: No direct experience with security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, tamper detection) or embedded networking protocols (NETCONF, SNMP)
